name: Coinbase
description: Coinbase is a leading cryptocurrency exchange platform. The API allows you to manage accounts, place buy and sell orders, view market data, transfer funds, and monitor transaction history across supported cryptocurrencies.

capabilities.name: list_accounts
capabilities.description: List all cryptocurrency accounts and their balances for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: get_spot_price
capabilities.description: Get the current spot price for a cryptocurrency pair like BTC-USD or ETH-EUR.

capabilities.name: list_transactions
capabilities.description: List all transactions (buys, sells, sends, receives) for a specific account.

capabilities.name: send_money
capabilities.description: Send cryptocurrency from one of your accounts to an external address or another Coinbase user.

capabilities.name: place_buy_order
capabilities.description: Place a buy order to purchase cryptocurrency using your linked payment method.

capabilities.name: place_sell_order
capabilities.description: Place a sell order to sell cryptocurrency from your account back to your payment method.

capabilities.name: list_exchange_rates
capabilities.description: Get exchange rates for a base currency against all other supported currencies.

capabilities.name: list_payment_methods
capabilities.description: List all payment methods (bank accounts, cards) linked to the authenticated user's account.
